public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as apprentice factor.
appearance: Maren Threadmere carries the marks of apprentice factor in ink, rain, and polished cloth: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Treats exchange as a social instrument as much as an economic one, reading appetite and hesitation alike. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a apprentice factor still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of apprentice factor in and around Shelkopolis Public Library, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Shelkopolis Public Library while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Maren Threadmere can entangle the party in price, debt, or delivery terms that become more dangerous than they first appear.
Maren Threadmere will trade route, scarcity, or faction insight once the party resolves a commercial problem others cannot touch openly.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Maren Threadmere read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Shelkopolis Public Library: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value

first_impression: Maren Threadmere presents as Treats exchange as a social instrument as much as an economic one, reading appetite and hesitation alike. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a apprentice factor still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Apprentice Factor, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Shelk.
what_they_refuse: Maren Threadmere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Apprentice Factor too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Maren Threadmere can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Maren Threadmere adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Maren Threadmere is Known locally through day-to-day work as apprentice factor. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Apprentice Factor.
social_texture: Maren Threadmere speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Shelkopolis Public Library, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Maren touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Maren Threadmere when the party needs a socially grounded face for Shelkopolis Public Library: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
